question: How many customers are there in total?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers;

question: What are the 5 most expensive products by unit price?
sql: SELECT name, unit_price FROM products ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 5;

question: How many customers are in each segment?
sql: SELECT segment, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY segment ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

question: What is the total revenue from completed orders?
sql: SELECT SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed';

question: How many orders were placed in each status?
sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY order_count DESC;

question: What is the total revenue per product category?
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(o.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: Which region has the highest number of customers?
sql: SELECT r.name AS region, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers c JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the average order value per customer segment?
sql: SELECT c.segment, AVG(o.revenue) AS avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.segment ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC;

question: What is the total revenue generated by each marketing channel?
sql: SELECT camp.channel, SUM(o.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN campaigns camp ON o.campaign_id = camp.campaign_id GROUP BY camp.channel ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the average support ticket satisfaction score by priority level?
sql: SELECT priority, ROUND(AVG(satisfaction), 2) AS avg_satisfaction FROM support_tickets WHERE satisfaction IS NOT NULL GROUP BY priority ORDER BY avg_satisfaction DESC;

question: Which top 5 customers have spent the most in total?
sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.full_name, SUM(o.revenue) AS total_spent FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.full_name ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the average resolution time in hours for support tickets by category?
sql: SELECT category, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 3600), 2) AS avg_resolution_hours FROM support_tickets WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_resolution_hours;

question: What is the month-over-month revenue trend for the last 6 months?
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)::DATE AS month, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' AND order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

question: Which customers have placed orders more than 6 months ago but have not ordered since?
sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.full_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.full_name HAVING MAX(o.order_date) < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months' ORDER BY last_order_date LIMIT 100;

question: What is the profit margin percentage per product category?
sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(AVG((o.unit_price - p.cost_price) / NULLIF(o.unit_price, 0) * 100), 2) AS avg_margin_pct FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY avg_margin_pct DESC;

question: For each region, what percentage of total revenue came from Enterprise customers?
sql: WITH regional_revenue AS ( SELECT r.name AS region, SUM(o.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.name ), enterprise_revenue AS ( SELECT r.name AS region, SUM(o.revenue) AS enterprise_revenue FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise' GROUP BY r.name ) SELECT rr.region, ROUND(er.enterprise_revenue / rr.total_revenue * 100, 2) AS enterprise_pct FROM regional_revenue rr JOIN enterprise_revenue er ON rr.region = er.region ORDER BY enterprise_pct DESC;

question: What is the revenue per marketing campaign ranked by ROI (revenue divided by budget)?
sql: SELECT camp.name AS campaign_name, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / NULLIF(camp.budget, 0), 2) AS roi FROM campaigns camp JOIN orders o ON camp.campaign_id = o.campaign_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY camp.campaign_id, camp.name, camp.budget ORDER BY roi DESC LIMIT 10;

question: What is the average lifetime value of customers by signup year and segment?
sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', signup_date)::DATE AS signup_year, segment, ROUND(AVG(lifetime_value), 2) AS avg_lifetime_value FROM customers GROUP BY signup_year, segment ORDER BY signup_year, segment;

question: Which products have been returned or cancelled more than 10 times?
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.name AS product_name, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status IN ('returned', 'cancelled') GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY total_count DESC;

question: For each customer segment, what fraction of customers have submitted at least one support ticket?
sql: SELECT c.segment, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT st.customer_id)::NUMERIC / COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_id), 2) AS fraction_with_tickets FROM customers c LEFT JOIN support_tickets st ON c.customer_id = st.customer_id GROUP BY c.segment ORDER BY fraction_with_tickets DESC;

question: What is the total number of orders in the database?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders;

question: What are all the distinct product categories?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM products ORDER BY category;

question: What is the average lifetime value of all customers?
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(lifetime_value), 2) AS avg_lifetime_value FROM customers;

question: How many support tickets are there in total?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_tickets FROM support_tickets;

question: What is the most common order status?
sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total revenue per region?
sql: SELECT r.name AS region, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue), 2) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: How many support tickets has each customer segment submitted?
sql: SELECT c.segment, COUNT(st.ticket_id) AS ticket_count FROM customers c JOIN support_tickets st ON c.customer_id = st.customer_id GROUP BY c.segment ORDER BY ticket_count DESC;

question: What is the total quantity sold per product category?
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

question: What is the average number of orders per customer?
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_count), 2) AS avg_orders_per_customer FROM (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id) sub;

question: How many distinct customers placed orders in each region?
sql: SELECT r.name AS region, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS customer_count FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

question: What is the average ticket satisfaction score per region?
sql: SELECT r.name AS region, ROUND(AVG(st.satisfaction), 2) AS avg_satisfaction FROM support_tickets st JOIN customers c ON st.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id WHERE st.satisfaction IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY avg_satisfaction DESC;

question: What are the top 5 campaigns by number of associated orders?
sql: SELECT camp.name AS campaign_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM campaigns camp JOIN orders o ON camp.campaign_id = o.campaign_id GROUP BY camp.campaign_id, camp.name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the total marketing budget per channel?
sql: SELECT channel, ROUND(SUM(budget), 2) AS total_budget FROM campaigns GROUP BY channel ORDER BY total_budget DESC;

question: What percentage of total orders does each product category account for?
sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(COUNT(o.order_id)::NUMERIC / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) * 100, 2) AS order_pct FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY order_pct DESC;

question: Which customers have ordered from all 3 product categories?
sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.full_name FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.full_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.category) = 3 ORDER BY c.full_name LIMIT 20;

question: What is the average completed order value for customers who have placed more than 10 orders?
sql: WITH frequent_customers AS ( SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ) SELECT ROUND(AVG(o.revenue), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN frequent_customers fc ON o.customer_id = fc.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed';

question: What is the average profit margin percentage per region?
sql: SELECT r.name AS region, ROUND(AVG((o.unit_price - p.cost_price) / NULLIF(o.unit_price, 0) * 100), 2) AS avg_margin_pct FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.region_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY avg_margin_pct DESC;

question: For each product category, what fraction of orders were completed?
sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC / COUNT(*), 2) AS completion_rate FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY completion_rate DESC;

question: Which are the top 5 campaigns by revenue-to-budget ratio among completed orders?
sql: SELECT camp.name AS campaign_name, camp.channel, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / NULLIF(camp.budget, 0), 2) AS revenue_to_budget FROM campaigns camp JOIN orders o ON camp.campaign_id = o.campaign_id AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY camp.campaign_id, camp.name, camp.channel, camp.budget ORDER BY revenue_to_budget DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the total revenue and average order value for each combination of customer segment and product category?
sql: SELECT c.segment, p.category, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue), 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(AVG(o.revenue), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.segment, p.category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
